headline: 6 April Raises With 1 High Yield Giving 20% And 1 Cut
summary: The Rose Income Garden portfolio holds 73 dividend stocks, yielding 6% and beating the SPY year-to-date as XEL and GPC show value. Learn more on the RIG portfolio here.

headline: Genuine Parts AGM: Strong 2025 Results, 70th Dividend Hike, Confirms Auto/Industrial Split Plan
summary: Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) used its 2026 annual shareholder meeting to highlight 2025 financial performance, discuss capital allocation priorities and board changes, and reiterate plans to separate its automotive and industrial businesses into two publicly traded companies. Business overview and 2025
